reason: Defines RVV+scalar dispatch route manifest ownership and target artifact route registration boundaries.
Defines RVV plugin locality and finite RVV binary family constraints used by the dispatch route surface.
Keeps target-specific route ownership out of shared core pass logic.
Requires compiler and route-registration behavior to remain in C++/MLIR/CMake rather than Python.
Defines focused C++ and lit verification expectations for target route and artifact behavior.
